Member Data Documentation

◆ joint_limit_activation_distance

double franky::TorqueSafetyParams::joint_limit_activation_distance {0.1}

Activation distance from a limit in [rad].

◆ joint_limit_damping

double franky::TorqueSafetyParams::joint_limit_damping {1.0}

Additional damping when moving into a limit in [Nms/rad].

◆ joint_limit_max_torque

double franky::TorqueSafetyParams::joint_limit_max_torque {5.0}

Absolute torque clamp for the repulsion term in [Nm].

◆ joint_limit_stiffness

double franky::TorqueSafetyParams::joint_limit_stiffness {4.0}

Base repulsion gain in [Nm].

◆ lower_joint_limits

std::optional<Vector7d> franky::TorqueSafetyParams::lower_joint_limits {}

Lower soft joint limits in [rad]. Joint-limit repulsion is active when both limits are set.

◆ max_delta_tau

double franky::TorqueSafetyParams::max_delta_tau {1.0}

Maximum allowed torque step per cycle in [Nm].

◆ upper_joint_limits

std::optional<Vector7d> franky::TorqueSafetyParams::upper_joint_limits {}

Upper soft joint limits in [rad]. Joint-limit repulsion is active when both limits are set.
